Indianapolis, IN current weather (as of ~2 PM EDT on April 25, 2026):
Mostly sunny to partly cloudy, around 65-70°F (feels like mid-60s). High today ~74-77°F, low tonight ~48-49°F. Light winds (N/NW 5-10 mph). Low rain chance (~0-15%), no notable rain or wind risk.

Telegram update ready: "Indianapolis: ~68°F, mostly sunny. High 75°F. Light winds, no rain/wind concerns."
